description: Understand the project goals, requirements, and deliverables before starting any work.
Set up a Git repository to track changes and collaborate on the codebase.
Bootstrap the frontend app with Vite for fast development and optimized builds.
Complete all scheduled coding and implementation tasks planned for the first day.
Investigate libraries, patterns, and references needed to support Day 1 development work.
Complete all scheduled coding and implementation tasks planned for the second day.
Explore additional resources, documentation, and examples needed to support Day 2 development.
